---
title: "Paul Huggins"
author: "Paul Huggins"
date: "3/11/2020"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

### A Little Background on Me
My name is Paul Huggins and I was born in Grapevine, TX. I currently live in Rockwall, TX with my wife and our two children ages 2 and 6 months.

When I'm not working or studying, I like to spend time with my family playing outside with our dogs or going golfing.

Currently, I am working at R2Q Operating as a Production Analyst/Geologist at our corporate office located in Downtown Dallas.

I hold a BS in Geology from The University of Arkansas (2014) and an MS in Earth and Environemental Science with a Petroeum Geoscience focus from the University of Texas at Arlington (2015).

The following tab is an example of the work I have completed so far in the MSDS program at SMU.

![](images/Paul_Headshot.jpeg)
